data.title: Shiba Inu Poised For 180% Upside, Says Analyst — HODLers Keep Selling
data.description: Popular dog-themed cryptocurrency Shiba Inu (CRYPTO: SHIB) lifted sharply Wednesday amid a broader market rally.

data.title: Larry Summers Warns Of Nixon-Era Risks In Trump's Term: Policies Could Trigger 'Significantly Larger' Inflation
data.description: Former U.S. Treasury Secretary Larry Summers cautioned on Wednesday, Dec. 11, 2024, that President-elect Donald Trump's proposed economic policies could trigger more severe inflation than the surge experienced during President Joe Biden's term, highlighting potential risks for investors and markets.

data.title: Tom Lee Reiterates Bitcoin's $250,000 Target For 2025, Says New White House Is 'Embracing' Digital Assets: 'We Have A Trump Put'
data.description: Prominent financial market commentator Tom Lee doubled down on his $250,000 price target for Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) in 2025 on Wednesday, thanks to a friendlier White House.

data.title: Tesla's Red Hot Stock Meets Meme Magic $420 Level, Musk Celebrates 'The Prophecy' — Analysts React
data.description: Tesla's stock hit the symbolic $420 level, prompting celebratory reactions from Elon Musk and investors, marking a milestone in its impressive year-to-date performance fueled by innovation, strong sales, and market optimism.

data.title: Trump-Backed World Liberty Financial Bags $10M In Ethereum: What's Going On?
data.description: World Liberty Financial, a cryptocurrency project backed by President-elect Donald Trump, purchased Ethereum (CRYPTO: ETH) worth $10 million on Wednesday.
